productDisplayName: John Players Men Check White & Green Shirt
description: Style Note The right checks can be worn as formal wear as well as casual. Men now have that option with this checked shirt from the house of john players, designed with toned down colours. When paired with a good pair of dark trousers, this shirt will add a splash of colour and trend to your otherwise monotonous formal wear. Product Details Shirt with green vertical stripes and light purple horizontal stripes, has short sleeves, a spread collar, full buttoned placket, and a patch pocket on the left chest Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash cold using a mild detergent Do not bleach Tumble dry low or dry flat in shade inside out Use warm iron Size and Fit John Players' contemporary fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size 40
